'''Alole''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] who served as a diplomatic aide to [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[Chief of State (New Republic)/Legends|Chief of State]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] during the [[Black Fleet Crisis]].<ref name="Before the Storm" />

{{Char-stub}}
